title: Escape from Enies Lobby: Rising Conflict

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Yokozuna was probably with them, too...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They won't get what they deserve!!

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: You cannot see humans... on the map.

dialogue.speaker: Spandam
dialogue.text: That's what the buster call is!!!

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Bro, we've come to save you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
